case_title: LEONIDAS S DE CASTRO JR VS. CHAN TIM WONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY DE CASTRO JR, LEONIDAS S AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHAN TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-11-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LEONIDAS S. DE CASTRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHAN TIM WONG IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IS MICHELLE WONG, PROPERTY MANAGER/DAUGHTER. MS. MICHELLE WONG IS ASKED TO BRING TO COURT ANY DOCUMENT SUPPORTING HER PRESENTS IN DEFENDANT CHAN TIM WONG'S ABSENCE FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL DEANGELIS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
